description: baseBranchPatterns overrides the org-level default of ["dev"] — this repo's default branch is main, and without this override Renovate would target a branch that does not exist here.

packageRules.description: Microsoft.AspNetCore.Razor.Language and Microsoft.CodeAnalysis.Razor are deliberately frozen at 6.0.36. The generator reads Razor's internal syntax tree through a narrow seam; a version bump is a migration, not a dependency update. ADR 0001 pins the pair together (both are listed in its opening snippet), so both are matched here. See docs/adr/0001-eol-razor-mitigation.md.

Microsoft.CodeAnalysis.CSharp(.Workspaces) is deliberately frozen at 4.8.0. It is not the newest Roslyn that works — it is the LOWEST one the net10 analyzer host will load, chosen by spike so the netstandard2.0 Filament.Analyzer loads across the widest range of IDE/SDK hosts, with TypeSubset.Classify restricted to stable Roslyn surface to keep that floor honest. Raising the reference raises the minimum host Roslyn every consumer needs, and CI cannot catch that: every job runs dotnet-version 10.0.x, so a green run says nothing about the older hosts the pin exists to serve. Moving this floor is a deliberate decision that requires re-running the host-compatibility spike, not a dependency update. See docs/superpowers/plans/2026-07-18-analyzer-csharp-subset.md (Task 0, RESOLVED). Microsoft.CodeAnalysis.CSharp.Analyzer.Testing is deliberately NOT matched here — it is a 1.x test-only helper and tracks its own line.
